news.Title: [AI Summary] 精材3月營收年增14.25% 股價週漲4.39%
news.Content:
• 精材本週股價上漲 4.39%，上週五收盤價為 159.50 元，今日收盤價為 166.50 元。,
• 精材公布 2026 年 3 月合併營收為 6.99 億元，年增 14.25%。

【綜合分析】
參考來源：Yahoo奇摩股市: 1則 | 資料期間：2026-04-10 至 2026-04-10 | 新聞數量：1 則

半導體封測廠精材（3374）於 2026 年 4 月 10 日公布 3 月份合併營收達 6.99 億元，相較去年同期成長 14.25%，顯示公司營運狀況穩健。受此消息影響，精材近期股價表現亮眼，本週累積漲幅達 4.39%。

從股價資訊來看，精材在 2026 年 4 月 1 日的收盤價為 159.50 元，至 4 月 10 日最新收盤價為 166.50 元，單日小幅下跌 0.30%，但整體一週呈現上漲趨勢。此次公布的 3 月營收成長，無疑為股價提供了有力支撐。儘管公布營收當日股價小幅回落，但市場對公司營運前景仍抱持樂觀態度。

新聞資料庫顯示，精材 3 月份營收的年增率達到 14.25%，這是一個積極的訊號，可能與其在封測領域的市場份額擴大、新訂單的挹注，或是整體半導體產業景氣復甦有關。然而，由於僅有一則新聞資料，且其中包含其他公司（如台鋼建設、長科*）的營收資訊，詳細的營收成長動能與未來展望仍有待進一步的公開資訊說明。目前來看，精材的營運表現與股價走勢呈現正向連結，投資者可持續關注公司後續的營運報告與產業動態。

news.Title: [AI Summary] Xintec March Revenue Up 14.25% YoY, Stock Rises 4.39% Weekly
news.Content:
• Xintec stock rose 4.39% this week, with the closing price on Friday of last week at NT$159.50 and the latest closing price today at NT$166.50.
• Xintec announced its consolidated revenue for March 2026 reached NT$699 million, a year-on-year increase of 14.25%.

[Analysis]
Sources: Yahoo Finance Taiwan: 1 article | Period: 2026-04-10 to 2026-04-10 | Number of articles: 1

Semiconductor packaging and testing company Xintec (3374) announced its consolidated revenue for March 2026 on April 10, 2026, reaching NT$699 million, a year-on-year increase of 14.25%, indicating steady operational performance. Influenced by this news, Xintec's stock price has performed well recently, with a cumulative increase of 4.39% this week.

Looking at the stock price information, Xintec's closing price on April 1, 2026, was NT$159.50, and the latest closing price on April 10 was NT$166.50. While the stock saw a slight decrease of 0.30% on the day, the overall trend for the week was upward. The announced March revenue growth undoubtedly provided strong support for the stock price. Despite a slight pullback on the day of the revenue announcement, the market remains optimistic about the company's operational outlook.

The news database indicates that Xintec's year-on-year revenue growth for March reached 14.25%, which is a positive sign. This could be related to an expansion of its market share in the packaging and testing sector, the contribution of new orders, or an overall recovery in the semiconductor industry. However, as there is only one news article, and it also includes revenue information from other companies (such as Taiwan Steel Construction and Changke*), detailed drivers of revenue growth and future outlook require further public information. Currently, Xintec's operational performance and stock price trends are positively correlated, and investors can continue to monitor the company's subsequent operational reports and industry dynamics.
